title: Random Mob Challenge
description: A Simple mod where a Entity spawns from a player set tick interval.
body:
## Random Mob Challenge (RMC)

Ready to turn your world into a chaotic survival test? Random Mob Challenge is a lightweight but intense mod that ensures danger is always just a few ticks away.

> **The premise is simple: a random mob spawns near the player at a set interval. It could be a harmless sheep, or it could be a Ender Dragon.**

---

### 🛠️ The mod is fully controllable via two simple in-game commands:_


```/rmc enable-disable```: Toggles the mod on or off. Use this when you need a break or if things get too crowded. **With this Command, you also need to Start the Challenge.**

```/rmc interval <ticks>```: Sets the time between spawns. Remember that Minecraft runs at 20 ticks per second. Setting the interval to 400 means a new mob every 20 seconds, while setting it to 20 means a new mob every single second.

---

Whether you are looking for a new way to play hardcore or just want to spice up your next livestream, RMC provides a layer of unpredictability to your gameplay.
